name: Rumours of a Roman Empire
short_description: In this alternate-universe Visual Novel and Dating Sim, play as Julia or Julius Caesar and navigate the intrigue of the Late Roman Republic. Flirt, scheme, and outwit Rome’s elite to shape history—and forge an empire of your own.
detailed_description:
Play as either..


About the Game

After a pesky tribe of Gauls denies Caesar the complete conquest of Gaul, the troubled General decides to return to Rome to speak to the Senate and request additional legions and supplies to finish the conquest of Gaul. Given Caesar has spent many years away from the Capital City, she finds that things have changed a lot since she has left. There are new players in power swaying the attitude of the senate including a mysterious Egyptian princess who has become Rome’s new cause celebre.

“Rumours of a Roman Empire” is a Visual Novel and Dating Sim set in an alternate universe Late Roman Republic where both men and women wield the great city’s power. Play as either Julia or Julius Caesar as s/he must navigate the complex world of the Late Roman Republic and play its most influential members one against the other to get what she wants. Meet Rome’s powerful elite and see how you can influence the destiny of the Roman Republic and perhaps hone the greatest Empire the world has ever seen.

  • Meet influential players in the world of the late Roman Republic

  • Play as either a straight man (Julius Caesar) or as a lesbian woman (Julia Ceasar).

  • Dive into a plot full of intrigue, conspiracies and light touches of romance and humour

  • Beautiful anime style art

  • Epic orchestral soundtrack
